channel.title: Amphibian Labs Blog
channel.description: Philosophy, engineering, and practical guides for businesses that want to use technology without being used by it.

item.title: Why we enhance your systems instead of replacing them
item.description: Most consultants recommend what they sell. We recommend what fits. Here's our philosophy on system enhancement over replacement.

item.title: How we built DocIQ: an open-source AI engine for medical document processing
item.description: 1,100+ tests, 3 document types, 2 languages, FHIR R4 compliant. A technical deep-dive into building production-grade document intelligence.

item.title: 5 signs your business is ready for AI - and 3 signs you're not
item.description: AI isn't magic. It's infrastructure. Here's how to tell if your business is actually ready - and what to fix first if you're not.
